common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to get one shop discount activity detail

request_params.name: discount_id
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a discount activity.

request_params.name: page_no
request_params.description: Specifies the page number of data to return in the current call. Starting from 1. if data is more than one page, the page_no can be some entry to start next call.

request_params.name: page_size
request_params.description: Each result set is returned as a page of entries. Use the "page_size" filters to control the maximum number of entries to retrieve per page (i.e., per call), and the "page_no" to start next call. This integer value is used to specify the maximum number of entries to return in a single "page" of data.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking

children.name: status
children.description: The status of discount promotion

children.name: discount_name
children.description: Title of the discount.
The items selected in this discount.
children.name: item_list
item_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an item.

children.name: item_name
children.description: Name of the item in local language.

children.name: normal_stock
children.description: The current stock quantity of the item.

children.name: item_promotion_stock
children.description: The reserved stock of the item. If the item has no variation, this param is necessary.

children.name: item_original_price
children.description: The original price before discount of the item. If there is variation, this value is 0.

children.name: item_promotion_price
children.description: The discount price of the item. If there is variation, this value is 0.

children.name: item_inflated_price_of_original_price
children.description: The original price after tax of item (Only for taxable Shop).

children.name: item_inflated_price_of_promotion_price
children.description: The discount price after tax of item (Only for taxable Shop).

The local price of item calculated as: Local Price = CB Original Price × Local Adjustment Rate.
Reflects the final local price derived from shop-level adjustment rules and is denominated in local currency.
children.name: item_local_price

children.description:
The local discount price of item calculated as: Local Discount Price = Local Price × Discount Rate.
Reflects the final local seller discount price derived from setting a seller discount and is denominated in local currency.
children.name: item_local_promotion_price

children.description: The local price after tax of item (Only for taxable Shop).
children.name: item_local_price_inflated

children.description: The local discount price after tax of item (Only for taxable Shop).
children.name: item_local_promotion_price_inflated

children.description: The models belong to this item.
children.name: model_list
model_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a variation of an item.

children.name: model_name
children.description: Name of the variation that belongs to the same item.

children.name: model_normal_stock
children.description: The current stock quantity of the variation.

children.name: model_promotion_stock
children.description: The reserved stock of the model.

children.name: model_original_price
children.description: The original price before discount of the variation.

children.name: model_promotion_price
children.description: The discount price of the variation.

children.name: model_inflated_price_of_original_price
children.description: The original price after tax of model (Only for taxable Shop).

children.name: model_inflated_price_of_promotion_price
children.description: The discount price after tax of model (Only for taxable Shop).

The local price of model calculated as: Local Price = CB Original Price × Local Adjustment Rate.
Reflects the final local price derived from shop-level adjustment rules and is denominated in local currency.
children.name: model_local_price

children.description:
The local discount price of model calculated as: Local Discount Price = Local Price × Discount Rate.
Reflects the final local seller discount price derived from setting a seller discount and is denominated in local currency.
children.name: model_local_promotion_price

children.description: The local price after tax of model (Only for taxable Shop).
children.name: model_local_price_inflated

children.description: The local discount price after tax of model (Only for taxable Shop).
children.name: model_local_promotion_price_inflated
purchase_limit
children.description: The max number of this product in the promotion price.

children.name: start_time
children.description: The time when discount activity start.

children.name: discount_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a discount activity.

children.name: end_time
children.description: The time when discount activity end.

children.name: more
children.description: This is to indicate whether the item list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve the rest of items.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/discount/get_discount?access_token=access_token&discount_id=1000029882&page_no=1&page_size=50&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
